name: quality-scorecard
title: Data Quality Scorecard
subtitle: overall score, dimensions vs target & issue mix
description: A data-quality showcase — an overall quality gauge, dimension-vs-target bullets, a domain×check quality heatmap, an outcome donut, and issues by type.

dataAccesses.name: DqKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1) AS overall, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN result='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) AS pass_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN result='FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failing, COUNT(DISTINCT check_name) AS checks FROM v_quality_check

dataAccesses.name: OverallScore
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1) AS overall FROM v_quality_check

dataAccesses.name: DimensionVsTarget
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT dimension, ROUND(AVG(score),0) AS score, ROUND(AVG(target),0) AS target FROM v_quality_dimension GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: QualityGrid
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT domain, check_name AS check, ROUND(AVG(score),0) AS score FROM v_quality_check GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: Outcome
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT result, COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_quality_check GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: IssuesByType
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT issue_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM v_quality_issue GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 8

kpis.label: Checks Passing
kpis.info: Share of quality checks currently passing.

kpis.label: Failing Checks
kpis.info: Checks in a failing state right now.

panels.title: Overall Quality
panels.info: Composite quality score across all checks.

panels.title: Check Outcomes
panels.info: Pass / warn / fail split across checks.

panels.title: Quality by Domain × Check
panels.info: Where quality is strong — and where it needs attention.

panels.title: Dimensions vs Target
panels.info: Each quality dimension against its target.
